channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: atelier mimina announces fast-paced casual action game Yokai Batting Game in Kawagoe for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

How long can you survive a Japanese festival night?

atelier mimina, the studio behind Giraffe and Annika and the upcoming HARUKA: Beyond the Stars, has announced Yokai Batting Game in Kawagoe, a fast-paced casual action game coming to PC via Steam in 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Smash yokai. Save Kawagoe. All with just one button.

Yokai Batting Game is a fast-paced casual action game set on the lantern-lit festival streets of Kawagoe.

On the night of a full moon, mischievous yokai flood the town—it’s up to you to knock them all away and restore peace!

Armed with only a baseball bat, you’ll swing, time, and smash your way through waves of yokai using simple one-button controls. Easy to learn, hard to master, and fun for players of all ages.

Step into a vibrant Japanese festival night and see how long you can survive!

Key Features

  • One-Button Action – Simple controls anyone can play—just time your swing!
  • Endless Waves of Yokai – Cute but chaotic yokai will keep coming. Stay focused!
  • Festival Atmosphere – Experience the charm of Kawagoe’s lantern-lit streets and matsuri vibes
  • Four Unique Stages – Matsuri, Water Park, Imo Farm, and Kura Street.
  • Four Difficulty Levels Per Stage – From relaxed play to intense challenges

Why You’ll Love It

  • Quick sessions, perfect for casual play.
  • Satisfying “hit” feeling.
  • Easy to pick up, addictive to master.
  • Great for all ages.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/atelier-mimina-announces-fast-paced-casual-action-game-yokai-batting-game-in-kawagoe-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: FATE: Reawakened DLC ‘Prometheus’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Publishers gamigo and WildTangent, and developers gamigo and Tableflip Entertainment have announced action RPG collection FATE: Reawakened downloadable content “Prometheus.” It will launch in Q2 2026.

Here is an overview of the content, via gamigo:

About

Inspired by Greek mythology, the downloadable content “Prometheus” will bring new pets, two new dungeons, new monsters, and a whole new town to explore.

Littered with victories from previous battles, players thought they could rest in the calm after the storm… that is, until Alethe, a mysterious young woman appeared at the Temple of Fate. She tells of how Prometheus, a city once blessed by the Gods, has been all but forsaken by them. Erebos, the Titan of Darkness, has thrown the world into chaos by stealing the Golden Flame—a revered gift from the Gods that granted the city’s denizens with knowledge, protection, and everlasting prosperity.

Now FATE calls upon the player once again, beckoning them forward to reclaim the Golden Flame and save Prometheus from being cast into eternal shadow.

Key Features

  • A new town hub trapped by darkness
  • A new dungeon of corrupted marble
  • A new companion pet: Baby Pegasus

“Prometheus” is accessible in FATE: Undiscovered Realms via the Temple of Fate.

FATE: Reawakened is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, iOS, and Android.

Watch the teaser trailer below.

DLC “Prometheus” Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/fate-reawakened-dlc-prometheus-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: MINOS launches April 9
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Maze-building strategic puzzle game dated.

Maze-building strategic puzzle game MINOS will launch for PC via Steam on April 9, publisher Devolver Digital and developer Artificer announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

MINOS is a maze-building roguelite where you, the fabled Minotaur, must defend your sanctuary from bloodthirsty adventurers.

They’ve heard the stories of a monster in the dark, fame and riches waiting for the one who slays it. What they don’t know is that you are the one who built this maze, laid the traps, and now lie in wait.

Every run brings new enemies, new traps, and new ways to turn their bravery into a bloody disaster. No two nights are ever the same.

Key Features

  • Build Your Perfect Trap – Drag walls, gates, and corridors into place to shape your maze however you like. Make long, winding paths full of traps or confuse and split them up with rotating passages and shifting gates. It’s your labyrinth. Cruel or clever, it’s up to you.
  • Chain Reactions of Death
    Every spike, boulder, blade, and fire trap can be linked into intricate sequences. Set pressure plates to trigger a whole cascade of chaos, fooling heroes into thinking they are making progress, right before everything goes beautifully, horribly wrong.
  • Who’s the Real Monster? – Uncover the story behind the Minotaur and the man who became it. What drove Daedalus to create such a place? When Theseus finally comes, you’ll decide who deserves to walk out alive.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/minos-launches-april-9
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ground Zero launches April 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Retro-inspired survival horror game dated.

Post-apocalyptic South Korea-set retro-inspired survival horror game Ground Zero will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on April 16, publisher Kwalee and developer Malformation Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Ground Zero is a retro survival horror set in post-apocalyptic South Korea.

A devastating meteor impact has wiped out South Korea. Two months later as the dust and lightning storms settle and the air becomes breathable, an elite Korean operative and her Canadian partner are sent to investigate. What waits for them in the foggy remains is more terrifying than they ever could have imagined…

Key Features

  • Fight terrifying monsters that lurk in the dark corners of Busan, mutated by the fallout of the impact.
  • Uncover the truth of what really hit Busan that day. What are these strange growths unravelling from the meteor impact, and why has it corrupted what little life remains in the aftermath?
  • Explore a beautiful city in ruins, from shoreline towns and temples to the urban center.
  • Defend yourself with an array of abilities; shoot, stab, kick and counter as an expert soldier trained in firearm and martial combat.
  • Perfect your fighting skills and get rewarded. Cleaner kills means more Genome Points, which can be traded for powerful gear upgrades.
  • Take on huge, terrifying bosses. Seo-Yeon has no idea just how bad the mutations can get in the heart of the city. Be prepared for anything.
  • Relive the spirit of classic Survival Horror. Ground Zero captures the nostalgia of retro horror titles with fixed cameras and pre-rendered backgrounds, puzzles, custom difficulty and optional tank controls.
  • Have fun with unlockables and extra content: alternate outfits, additional game modes and hidden endings await players curious enough to find them.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/ground-zero-launches-april-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
